creator: rmacklem@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Micael from comment #0)
Do you know where AWS documents pNFS support?

I couldn't find any mention of pNFS when I googled
and I was not aware that AWS EFS had pNFS support in it.

Btw, you will probably want the "oneopenown" mount option.
AWS EFS's NFSv4.n server has (or at least had) a rather small
limit on the number of open_owners.
